channel.title: Deepgram on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Deepgram on Joe Muller's Blog

item.description:
November 7, 2024

A New Language

Working with AI is like blending your brain on high. You can work on multiple projects back-to-back-to-back with moderate efficiency and that’s amazing and tiresome at the same time. AI has made me want to build more and so I start a new project every time the opportunity presents itself. My creative mind has become increasingly fractal, spiraling outward in every direction, and to keep up with my plans my brain needs to stay focused for longer.

November 6, 2024

Towards Something

The more I work as a developer, the more it becomes clear that I could spend my entire life struggling with the details. Every day there are new tools, frameworks, and patterns to learn. Tools you mastered change. The language syntaxes you burned into your connectome aren’t resilient to the turn of the clock hand. If I were an electrician, I could spend a lifetime pinching at the wires with solder-coated fingers.
